name: Chicken Dried Beef Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap half a slice of bacon around each rolled chicken breast, placing the open end down.
2. Place the wrapped chicken breasts in a casserole dish lined with dried beef.
3. Mix together the soups and sour cream.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken breasts.
5. Bake at 300 degrees for 3 hours. Serve with rice or noodles.
